name: Simple Tofu Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. In a hot pan with oil, sauté onions until they are limp.
2. Add the diced green bell pepper, mushrooms, cubed tofu, sunflower seeds, water, and herbs (basil and sage).
3. Simmer the mixture until all vegetables are tender.
4. Serve over cooked rice.
"Vegetarian Times Cookbook"
